interpretation.non_s101_or_extension_rows: Runtime display constructs and extension/inland profile rows are classified explicitly; do not claim these are S-101 ENC features.
interpretation.raw_s101_svg_warning: Raw S-101 SVG witnesses are shape/reference evidence; colour semantics come from resolver attributes.
interpretation.s101_feature_equivalent_rows: S-101 mapping evidence exists as direct, rule-derived, catalogue-rule, or acceptable-deviation evidence.
interpretation.unresolved_rows: No row may remain in this bucket; add a standards mapping or an explicit non-S-101/profile classification.
